Valentine Craft Event

Date: February 10, 2026
Time: 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM
Ages: All ages

About This Event

Get ready for Valentine's Day with a fun crafting evening! Join us to create beautiful Valentine's cards and boxes that your little ones will love to share with friends and family.

What You'll Create

  • Valentine's Day cards - personalized and handmade with love
  • Valentine boxes - perfect for collecting all those special cards at school
  • Creative keepsakes your children will treasure

What's Included

  • All craft supplies provided
  • Creative inspiration and ideas
  • Guided crafting experience
  • A fun evening of making memories together

Cost

$10 per person to cover craft supplies

This fee helps us provide quality materials including cardstock, decorative papers, stickers, ribbons, glue, markers, and all the special touches to make your Valentine's creations extra special!

Details

Perfect for parents and children to work together, or for crafty adults to create special Valentines for their little loved ones. Space is limited to ensure everyone has plenty of room to create, so please register in advance!

Registration

This event is now at full capacity. Thank you for your interest!

For questions, contact us at hello@thewanderinglantern.com or call (216) 999-4462.

Registration is now closed.
